---
pagetitle: "Above .500 | Sports forecasts & models"
---

```{=html}
<span class="kicker">Above .500</span>
<h1 class="headline">Our models</h1>
<p class="dek">The forecasts, ratings and simulations behind Above .500 —
every model re-runs when the site is built.</p>
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
from above500 import MODELS, nba_elo, render

forecasts = {"nba-elo": nba_elo.forecast()}

rows = "".join(
    render.model_row(
        m,
        updated=forecasts[m["slug"]]["updated"] if m["slug"] in forecasts else None,
        season=forecasts[m["slug"]]["season"] if m["slug"] in forecasts else None,
    )
    for m in MODELS
)
print(render.section_head("Latest forecasts", "Updated daily"))
print(f'<div class="model-index">{rows}</div>')
```
